intro:
I couldn't find any information on the plant Panicum ignoratum. However, I found a plant called Panicum virgatum, also known as Switch Grass or Panic Grass.

Panicum virgatum is a perennial grass native to North America. The health benefits of Panicum virgatum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. The bioactive constituents of Panicum virgatum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and oligosaccharides. The most common herbal preparations made with Panicum virgatum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support digestion and immune function.
